case_title: PAUL PELOSI JR VS. JOSEPH LUCIER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,500.00 FILED BY PELOSI JR, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT LUCIER, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PELOSI JR, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUCIER, JOSEPH $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,075.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF SUPPORTED CLAIM. NO NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY RECEIVED BY THE COURT OR THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED RE: JEFFREY GIBSON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-10-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO JEFFERY GIBSON , 117 GREENWICH STREET. SF CA.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY PELOSI JR, PAUL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2015 - JUDGMENT.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO MICHAEL COHAN 20 NAPER LANE , SF CA. 94110
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED OCT-16-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUCIER, JOSEPH
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LUCIER, JOSEPH
